title: Your Claude subscription. The harness you prefer.
description: A Pi request uses Alex's model namespace, routes through Dario because the caller is not Claude Code, and retains the harness and subscription provenance in one trace.

steps.label: Connect the Claude subscription
steps.detail: OAuth credentials stay in Alex's encrypted local vault

steps.label: Connect Pi to Alex
steps.detail: alex connect pi installs the scoped local route

steps.label: Alex selects the subscription path
steps.detail: Non-Claude-Code Anthropic traffic is routed through Dario

steps.label: The trace proves where it ran
steps.detail: Pi · Anthropic · Opus 4.8 · subscription identity · Dario
